[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000000110 2
1 0010001101 4
2 1110001111 7
3 0100010111 5
4 1110000100 4
5 0011110001 5
6 1011111011 8
7 1001011110 6

12 21 0010001111 5

67 76 0011110001 5 match 5
70 07 1011111011 8 match 6

36 63 1111111111 a
